notes: In fullscreen mode, crashes if you disable "3D Hardware Acceleration" or switch to another application. Also, when enabled “Custom Cursors”, it slows down in the "options window" or "pause window" when calling in a game. If you do not touch these two unnecessary settings or play in window mode, then everything works fine.
title: Zuma Deluxe

notes: No issues. Played with all default settings (including leaving 3D acceleration on). Unlike, say, Plants vs. Zombies, I didn't need to set any launch options. Game works out of the box. Alt+Tab also worked fine for me.
title: Zuma Deluxe
